name: Balance Card
description: As an action, you can brandish this card at one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself and drain its life force. The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or take {@damage 4d8} necrotic damage. You then regain a number of hit points equal to the necrotic damage the target takes. Once this property is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn."
